data.name: I Became my Punk Son's Fake Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
Chisako Fukada, a 38-year-old widow, has spent the past few years raising her son alone after the tragic death of her husband. Despite his rebellious attitude and wild behavior, Chisako always tries to understand and care for him. But one day, after a heated argument, her son suddenly runs away from home — and disappears without a trace.

Two years later, he returns, completely changed. Piercings, tattoos, and a punk attitude — but more shocking than his appearance is his request:

"Mom… I need you to pretend to be my girlfriend."

For reasons he refuses to fully explain, Chisako reluctantly agrees to play along. What starts as an absurd lie slowly spirals into something more complicated — filled with buried emotions, awkward moments, and an intimacy that neither of them expected.

But as the fake relationship progresses, Chisako begins to notice something unexpected: her son, who once was so rebellious and angry, begins to soften. He begins to understand the struggles and love of his mother had always tried to show him. Over time, he shifts from a defiant punk into someone who starts seeing his mother in a new, more compassionate light.

"I Became my Punk Son's Fake Girlfriend" is a provocative adult visual novel exploring taboo dynamics, linear storylines, short adult visual novel, family tensions, and the blurred lines between love, roleplay, and desire.

Intended for mature audiences only.

data.short_description: After her punk son runs away, Chisako, a single mother, is asked to pretend to be his girlfriend two years later. What begins as a lie leads to unexpected emotions and intimacy, as her son slowly begins to understand the love and sacrifices his mother has always shown him.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: in some cases sometimes require a graphics card that exceeds the minimum requirement.
